title: Scanned PDF Requires OCR
description: Scanned PDFs or images without text layers require the optional local Tesseract and Poppler OCR path or an upstream searchable PDF.
userVisibleMessage: OCR is required. Use the optional local OCR adapter or provide a searchable text-layer PDF before AI review.
workaround: Install Tesseract and Poppler, or create a searchable PDF with another trusted OCR tool.

title: OCR Adapter Missing
description: The document appears to need OCR, but the optional Tesseract OCR system adapter is not available.
userVisibleMessage: Scanned PDF extraction needs the optional Tesseract OCR adapter or an upstream text-layer PDF.
workaround: Install Tesseract OCR, or export/scan the document as a searchable text-layer PDF before importing.

title: Complex PDF Layout Simplification
description: Highly multi-column or overlapping layout PDFs may have paragraph ordering simplified.
userVisibleMessage: Complex PDF layout may be simplified. Review the extracted text block order manually.
workaround: Review raw markdown output to check sequence formatting.

title: PDF Rich Objects Require Review
description: Basic PDF text extraction does not fully reconstruct rich objects. The adaptive pipeline preserves uncertain images, formulas, and tables as source-linked visual assets, while annotations and embedded objects may remain source-only.
userVisibleMessage: Review PDF rich objects against the retained source. Visual assets may be preserved, but annotations, embedded objects, and complex page geometry are not fully reconstructed.
workaround: Keep the original PDF as the authoritative visual source and review extracted Markdown before sending it to AI.

title: DOCX Comments and Revisions Not Preserved
description: Word doc comments, track changes, and internal revisions are omitted during markdown conversion.
userVisibleMessage: Word comments and revision history are not preserved; only the final body text is extracted.
workaround: Accept all revisions and save a clean copy before importing.

title: DOCX Rich Layout Objects Not Preserved
description: Embedded images and common OMML formulas are preserved, but SmartArt, OLE objects, floating text boxes, comments, revisions, and high-fidelity layout are not fully represented in Markdown.
userVisibleMessage: DOCX/WPS images and common equations are preserved. Review SmartArt, embedded objects, comments, revisions, and complex page layout against the original file.
workaround: Keep the original DOCX for final layout review and inspect unsupported rich objects before sending to AI.

title: DOCX Macros and VBA Not Executed
description: Macros, VBA, scripts, and active document automation are not executed or preserved.
userVisibleMessage: Macros, VBA, and scripts are not executed or preserved. Schema Docs extracts static readable content and avoids running untrusted code.
workaround: Run or export macro-generated content in Office/WPS first, then import the resulting static document.

title: WPS Proprietary Formats Not Supported
description: .wps extension files are not parsed natively.
userVisibleMessage: WPS proprietary formats are not supported natively. Save the file as a standard .docx first.
workaround: Export to standard .docx format from WPS Office before importing.

title: Legacy Office Adapter Required
description: Legacy Office formats such as .doc, .xls, .ppt, and WPS proprietary files are not parsed by the zero-dependency core.
userVisibleMessage: Legacy Office files need LibreOffice (soffice) or must be exported to DOCX/XLSX/PDF before import.
workaround: Install LibreOffice, or save the file as .docx, .xlsx, .pdf, .md, .txt, or .csv first.

title: XLSX Formulas Not Executed
description: The spreadsheet extractor parses pre-calculated values but does not execute workbook formulas dynamically.
userVisibleMessage: Excel formulas are not executed; only the latest cached calculated cell values are extracted.
workaround: Save workbook to force calculation update, or use pre-calculated sheets.

title: Advanced SQL JOIN Limited
description: The lightweight in-memory query engine supports simple INNER JOIN ... ON equality, but does not support advanced JOIN variants, subqueries, HAVING, or full SQL planning.
userVisibleMessage: Offline queries support simple INNER JOIN. Complex JOINs, subqueries, and HAVING still require step-by-step queries or export-based processing.
workaround: Use SELECT ... FROM table JOIN other_table ON left_key = right_key, or split complex relational work into multiple local steps.

title: Real-time Two-way Sync Not Supported
description: The application does not continuously watch files for background bi-directional updates.
userVisibleMessage: Real-time two-way sync is not supported. Use manual refresh or import actions.
workaround: Manually trigger workspace refresh or reload files explicitly.

title: Styled PDF Export Requires Edge or Chromium
description: PDF generation uses an offline HTML and KaTeX pipeline and needs a supported local browser renderer.
userVisibleMessage: Styled A4 PDF export preserves rendered math, tables, and local images but requires local Edge or Chromium.
workaround: Enable Edge or Chromium, or export HTML or Word when no supported browser renderer is available.

title: Clean-machine Standalone Not Guaranteed
description: The Windows package includes a bundled Node runtime, but broader clean-machine and policy-restricted Windows verification is still required.
userVisibleMessage: Run Desktop diagnostics and the first workflow after installation; report startup or runtime failures with the generated diagnostics.
workaround: Keep app.exe beside its runtime directory, run Desktop diagnostics and Run first workflow, and attach the diagnostic bundle when reporting a failure.
